title: Maxwell & Williams Teas & C’s Kasbah Coffee Mug in Gift Box, Porcelain, Mint Green, 3 ml
features: A BEAUTIFUL GIFT BOXED PIECE: treat yourself or a friend to this pretty mug, decorated with intricate tessellating designs
MIX-AND-MATCH, MOROCCAN STYLE: Teas & C's Kasbah is a tableware range inspired by Moroccan tile patterns, ideal for mixing and matching
WITH LAVISH GOLD: the coffee cup has an elegant footed design and long, swirling handle, accented with gold-coloured details
CLASSIC PORCELAIN: all Teas & C's Kasbah pieces are made of high quality porcelain, for strength and heat resistance
USEFUL INFO: this ceramic mug has a 3 ml (1½ fl oz) capacity, and is dishwasher and microwave safe
description: From the manufacturer The Teas & C’s Kasbah Collection For all things tea and coffee, cake, chocolate, candy, confectionery and condiments look no further than Teas & C’s. Kasbah builds on the popular patterns of the Teas & C’s collection, adding Moroccan-inspired tile designs to the mix. Mix and match both designs, and turn afternoon tea into a delicious jumble of pattern and colour. Maxwell & Williams Teas & C’s Kasbah Porcelain Mug (Mint) Treat yourself or a coffee-loving friend to this beautiful patterned mug, which is gift boxed for easy giving. You don’t need to scour antique shops to find tableware that makes your heart race. This Moroccan-inspired footed mug is a true modern day curiosity, with its intricate tessellating patterns and gold-coloured accents. Keep it as a prized piece, ready for those 'just-me-and-my-happy-thoughts' moments. Or pair with other pieces from the Teas & C's collections to make a beautiful, mixed-and-matched tableware set. Designed in Australia by Maxwell & Williams Made of non-toxic porcelain Capacity: 300 ml (10½ fl oz) Microwave and dishwasher safe Packed in a Maxwell & Williams gift box About Maxwell & Williams Maxwell & Williams is globally recognised as the go-to brand for affordable quality in designer homewares. That it's sold in more than 500 retail outlets across the UK and Ireland and some 50 markets around the world speaks for itself. At heart, Maxwell & Williams' promise holds true to the foundations it was built upon - exceptional quality and the affordable lifestyle choices that each range creates. Something its loyal customers have enjoyed since the brand first entered the market.
